summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx to render the hero banner image from /assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png as a full-width hero section. The image tag uses appropriate CSS for full-width display with min/max height constraints. However, the actual binary image file (hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png) does not appear to have been added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ — no new files are listed in the diff. The frontend code references the image correctly, but saving the physical image file is a core part of REQ-1.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded wide banner image as hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The image file itself (A1EB606A-8094-4BB7-93B6-3C6A9B809C15-2.png saved as hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png) does not appear in the ADDED FILES section, which lists none. Without the physical image file present at the referenced static asset path, the hero section will render a broken image.
